title: Signature Curry Formula Using Advanced Kitchen King Masala
description: This formula works as a template: just swap the protein/vegetables and adjust cooking time. You can also double the masala for very intense restaurant-level flavor.

ingredients.title: Ingredients
items: Advanced Kitchen King Masala – 2 tsp (adjust to taste)
Red chili powder – 1/2 tsp (optional, for extra heat)
Cream or yogurt – 3 tbsp (optional, for richness)

instruction.title: Step 1 – Base Preparation
steps: Heat oil or ghee in a heavy-bottomed pan.
Add finely chopped onions. Sauté on medium-low flame until golden brown (the caramelization adds depth).
Add minced garlic and ginger. Sauté 1–2 minutes until aromatic.

instruction.title: Step 2 – Masala Layer
steps: Add pureed tomato. Cook until oil separates from the mixture.
Sprinkle 2 tsp Advanced Kitchen King Masala and optional red chili powder.
Cook for 2–3 minutes, stirring constantly, so the spices bloom.

instruction.title: Step 3 – Protein or Vegetables
steps: Add your choice of vegetables, paneer, or chicken.
Stir well, coating with the masala.
Add 1/2–3/4 cup water (depending on curry thickness). Cover and simmer:

instruction.title: Step 4 – Finishing Touches
steps: Stir in cream or yogurt for richness.

chefTips: Caramelized onions + roasted spices = restaurant magic.
Add cream at the end to prevent curdling and maintain a silky texture.
Simmer on low heat for deeper flavor; rushing this step is a common home-cook mistake.
For extra aroma, sprinkle a pinch of garam masala (or extra Kitchen King Masala) just before serving.
